moves.note: Cut all leveraged ETFs to zero
Cut all leveraged ETFs to zero

plan: Trim SPY to 20% to reduce concentration and comply with the mandate.
Sell all SOXL and SPAL to remove leveraged ETF exposure for capital preservation.
Increase QQQI to 25% for income focus, as it has a strong scanner read.
Buy XLE for 10% to diversify the portfolio with a strong scanner setup.
Buy AAPL for 10% as a top-quality name with a strong scanner setup.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation, aiming for steady, low-drawdown returns.
conservative.read: This conservative plan aims for a modest ~1.5%/month, focusing on capital preservation. It significantly reduces leverage and concentration, leading to lower expected volatility and drawdown risk. However, potential upside is also limited.

plan: Trim SPY to 25% to reduce concentration and comply with the mandate.
Sell SOXL and SPAL to exit flagged holdings and reduce overall leverage.
Trim QQQI to 15% to reduce exposure to the flagged holding.
Buy XLE for 10% to diversify the portfolio with a strong scanner setup.
Buy MSFT for 10% as a quality tech name with a strong scanner setup.
This plan blends broad index, quality tech, and diversification for balanced growth.
balanced.read: This balanced plan targets ~2.5%/month, prioritizing risk-first growth. It reduces leverage and concentration while diversifying into quality setups. Expect moderate volatility and drawdown potential, balancing growth with risk management.

plan: Trim SPY to 25% to comply with the concentration mandate.
Sell SOXL and SPAL to exit flagged holdings and reallocate capital.
Trim QQQI to 10% to reduce exposure to the flagged holding.
Buy ERX for 15% to add leveraged energy exposure with a high scanner score.
Buy NVDU for 15% to add leveraged tech exposure with a high scanner score.
This plan leans into high-scoring setups and leverage for aggressive growth.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets ~4%/month by increasing exposure to high-scoring, leveraged setups. This approach significantly amplifies both potential upside and drawdown risk. Leveraged ETFs decay daily, so strict stop discipline is critical to manage substantial potential losses.

moves.note: Cut all leveraged ETFs to zero
Cut all leveraged ETFs to zero

plan: Trim SPY to 25% to reduce concentration and comply with the mandate.
Sell SOXL and SPAL to remove all leveraged ETF exposure.
Trim CRWD to 5% to reduce exposure to high-beta single names.
Increase QQQI to 35% to prioritize income and leverage its strong scanner read.
Buy XOM for 10% to diversify for yield and capitalize on a strong scanner setup.
This plan focuses on income and broad index for steady monthly distributions.
income.read: This income plan aims for ~1%/month, prioritizing steady monthly distributions. It significantly reduces leverage and high-beta names, focusing on income-generating ETFs and quality broad index. While aiming for low drawdown, distributions are variable, and NAV can still decline in a selloff.
